inputDescription: Enter the password candidate and paste the bcrypt hash you want to verify.
hashDescription: Supports standard $2a$, $2b$, and $2y$ bcrypt strings with cost 04 through 31.
resultDescription: Run verification to see whether the password matches the hash.
emptyDescription: Paste a bcrypt hash, enter the password you want to test, then choose Verify.
loadingDescription: bcrypt is intentionally slow, so strong work factors can take a moment.
matchDescription: The entered password verifies against this bcrypt hash.
mismatchDescription: The entered password does not verify against this bcrypt hash.
invalidHashDescription: The hash must use the standard bcrypt format.
invalidHashHelp: Expected format: $2b$10$ followed by 53 bcrypt base64 characters.
privacyHint: Inputs stay in this browser session and are not saved to local storage.
